author: rotifer-petri
description: Checks open positions for stop-loss breaches and hold-time expirations. Pure computation over pre-fetched position data.

funds.description: Array of FundConfig objects with open positions and stop-loss/hold-time parameters

stopped.description: Positions closed because current price breached stop-loss threshold

expired.description: Positions closed because max hold days was exceeded

transparency.note: Pure computation: stop-loss and hold-time checks on pre-provided position data. No external I/O.
